scope: migration: the 2 legacy-parity raw-data CSV export report streams only (installs_report, in_app_events_report); AppsFlyer has no writes modeled by legacy (capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: organic installs is another text/csv export, but this connector's required CSV decoding is implemented by an existing StreamHook with a closed stream-to-report map outside defs; adding the stream would require editing internal/connectors/hooks/appsflyer, which is outside this shard's allowed write scope

organic in-app events is another text/csv export, but this connector's required CSV decoding is implemented by an existing StreamHook with a closed stream-to-report map outside defs; adding the stream would require editing internal/connectors/hooks/appsflyer, which is outside this shard's allowed write scope
